use_cases: Primary action buttons in forms and dialogs
Destructive action triggers with confirmation states
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
Loading state indicators for async operations
ai_summary: A versatile button component with 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 5 size options (sm, default, lg, xl, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for flexible theming, supports loading states, left/right icons, and Radix Slot composition. Includes hover, focus-visible, and disabled states with smooth transitions. Designed for mixed platform use in any industry requiring form actions or navigation triggers.
